components.text:
$(b)Body$(/b)
This is about cultivating the self, instead of giving up on your mortal shell cultivate it!
$(b)Intent$(/b)
This is all about cultivating your will. Until you can materialise it!
$(b)Essence$(/b)
This is standard cultivation!

What is body cultivation? 
Body Cultivations main way to cultivate is to take massive Damage of any type! 

It can also be increased by learning $(b)$(cl:pillcrafting)Pill Crafting$(/el)$(/b) and consuming pills!

What is intent cultivation? 
Intent Cultivations main way to cultivate is to deal massive Damage with Bow, Fist, Sword, Blade or Spear! 

It can also be increased by learning $(b)$(cl:pillcrafting)Pill Crafting$(/el)$(/b) and consuming pills!

What is essence cultivation? 
Essence Cultivations main way to cultivate is to hold down a keybind (C) by default.

It can also be increased by learning $(b)$(cl:pillcrafting)Pill Crafting$(/el)$(/b) and consuming pills!
